## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? 1-3 sentences. -->

## Type

- [ ] Feature (→ `develop`)
- [ ] Bug fix (→ `develop`)
- [ ] Hotfix (→ `main`, cherry-pick to `develop`)
- [ ] Release (`release/vX.Y` → `main`)
- [ ] Documentation / chore

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Production build succeeds (`npm run build`)
- [ ] New tests added for new behavior
- [ ] Manual smoke test completed (for UI changes)
- [ ] E2E tests pass (required for hotfix / release)

## Environment Impact

- [ ] Dev only
- [ ] Affects production (requires release or hotfix process)
- [ ] Database migration included (list migration file below)
- [ ] New environment variable required (list below)
- [ ] n8n workflow change required (list workflow ID below)
